# AccessoryNotification.File

**Structure**

A file associated with a notification.

## Declaration

```swift
struct File
```

## Overview

The [doc://com.apple.accessorynotifications/documentation/AccessoryNotifications/AccessoryNotification] structure’s [doc://com.apple.accessorynotifications/documentation/AccessoryNotifications/AccessoryNotification/attachments], [doc://com.apple.accessorynotifications/documentation/AccessoryNotifications/AccessoryNotification/sourceIcon], and [doc://com.apple.accessorynotifications/documentation/AccessoryNotifications/AccessoryNotification/contextIcon] properties use this type.

## Accessing file data

- **url**: A URL that locates the file’s data.

## Determining the file type

- **type**: A uniform type identifier for the file.

## Accessing related media

- **attachments**: An array of files sent with the notification.
- **sourceIcon**: An icon that represents the app that sent the notification.
- **contextIcon**: A secondary icon that provides additional contextual information about the notification.

## Conforms To

- Decodable
- Encodable
- Equatable
